hooks.command: cd $PROJECT_DIR && echo "[Pre-commit check]" && git diff --cached --stat && echo "" && git diff --cached --check 2>&1 || true
cd $PROJECT_DIR && git push 2>&1 || echo "[Auto-push failed] No upstream or network issue"

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); rem=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); out="$dir | $model"; [ -n "$rem" ] && out="$out | ctx:$rem%"; echo "$out"
